The HTML Maze
by kyrylo
◉ frozen archive

level 4 · 3,1

Engineering Forgotten Loft

Growths spread like metallic moss.
Locks pulse with pulsars.
Traces of eldritch events remain.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Left click to draw ✏️, right click to erase 🧽
Your marks stay in this tab only and vanish when you leave.

Writings on the Wall

This wall is sealed. Nothing new can be saved.

  • SESWSESEESWWSWSSSENNEESSEENNWNNESEEEESSS U NNWNENWWWWNENNEEENWWWNEEEES U NWSWSSESWWWWSSEES U NWNNWNNWWSESWSWNWNNNNEEES
  • North leads to stairs 2 down
  • d w->e
  • East leads to stairs to the exit!
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
  • West leads to stairs UP, north leads to stairs DOWN
  • East leads to stairs UP
  • North back to the stairs

The HTML Maze was built in July 2025 and frozen on 20 July 2026.

by kyrylo ~ x · bsky · mastodon
